MSEtool Data object for IOTC albacore

Source: R/data.R
albMSE_Data.Rd

Observed catch and CPUE data for Indian Ocean albacore tuna (Thunnus alalunga), reformatted from the albMSE ABC conditioning data (boot/data/alb_abcdata.rda) into an MSEtool::data object for use with candidate management procedures (CMPs). Covers 2000-2020 at quarterly (4-season) resolution across 6 fleets.

Usage

albMSE_Data

Format

A MSEtool::data object with:

  • Landings: a MSEtool::catchdata object, quarterly catch (t) by fleet (LL1-LL4, PS, Other), nTS = 84 timesteps

  • CPUE: a MSEtool::indicesdata object, quarterly CPUE by fleet, standardized to a mean of 1 per fleet

Source

albMSE::boot/data/alb_abcdata.rda (C, I objects)

On this page
